Transcrição Completa: 28 How To Move From Transactional To Recurring

 

[00:00]"So, you heard me in the last video mentioning not to [music] do transactional services and to always stick to recurring deals."

 

[00:08]"And to be clear, I just want to throw it out there for the fail safe where you have a transactional deal that you've already closed."

 

[00:15]"Maybe you already have an entire business created or you've thought about an entire business that's centralized around transactional services."

 

[00:23]"Transactional deals can sometimes turn into recurring deals. This is not a motivating video for you to all of a sudden create a business around transactional instead of recurring."

 

[00:33]"This is more of a failsafe video for the people who still choose that route for some reason."

 

[00:38]"Transactional services can sometimes turn into recurring deals. Not all the time. Sometimes it'll be a percentage completely dependent upon you and your closing ratio and how good of a result you get in the transaction."

 

[00:51]"Let's say you set up a consulting deal with somebody. It's a great example where they pay you $7,500 for a 30-day relationship where you skill transfer and knowledge transfer a particular area that you're an expert in into their staff or into whoever it is that they delegate."

 

[01:10]"Let's say that you don't intentionally do this, but you find other opportunities where either more time is needed to skill transfer, knowledge transfer, or there's additional skills and knowledge that can be transferred, which might take another 30 days to sell."

 

[01:25]"Or maybe they say or you identify as the consultant that there's not enough manpower or women power in the team. So, you can come in as an agency and provide that service."

 

[01:35]"There are all kinds of ways in a consulting deal where it's transactional to find opportunity to create a recurring deal. Okay?"

 

[01:42]"So, when you sell a transactional service, especially consulting, look for opportunities where there are recurring services that can be applied."

 

[01:50]"Don't be a consultant that's unethical and create opportunities to be exploited for recurring deals."

 

[01:56]"Simply go into the business with full integrity, honesty, and with a responsible viewpoint on whatever you're looking at."

 

[02:03]"Say, you know what? There's these areas right here that if you took them, these actions specifically would be high revenue driven actions."

 

[02:12]"You know, I've assessed that your internal team might not have the ability to do it. As a consultant, here's what I'd recommend."

 

[02:19]"Either hire somebody to do it, train so-and-so to handle this task, or just delegate us as an agency and charge this much per month in order for us to handle it for you."

 

[02:31]"Which one would you like to take? This can help a lot. Transactional to recurring. See you in the next video."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

$7,500 por deal de consultoria de 30 dias

30 dias de relacionamento para transferência de conhecimento

Percentual de conversão variável (dependente de taxa de fechamento e resultados)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Estratégia de Conversão Transacional → Recorrente: Identificar oportunidades durante entrega de serviço transacional

Método de Skill Transfer: Usar consultoria como porta de entrada para serviços recorrentes

Framework de Identificação de Gaps: Avaliar capacidade interna da equipe do cliente

Abordagem Ética de Upsell: Não criar problemas artificiais, apenas identificar necessidades reais

Modelo de Três Opções: Oferecer contratação interna, treinamento ou delegação à agência

 

ESTRUTURA:

Fase 1 - Transacional: Deal inicial de consultoria (30 dias)

Fase 2 - Avaliação: Identificar gaps de capacidade, tempo ou conhecimento

Fase 3 - Proposta Recorrente: Apresentar oportunidades de continuidade

Fase 4 - Conversão: Transformar relacionamento pontual em recorrente

 

OPORTUNIDADES DE CONVERSÃO IDENTIFICADAS:

Necessidade de mais tempo para skill transfer

Conhecimentos adicionais a serem transferidos

Falta de recursos humanos (manpower/womenpower)

Ações de alta receita que equipe interna não consegue executar

Lacunas de capacidade técnica da equipe

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Investimento inicial: $7,500 (consultoria 30 dias)

Modelo recorrente: Valor mensal variável (não especificado)

ROI dependente de taxa de fechamento e qualidade de resultados

 

PRINCÍPIOS ÉTICOS DESTACADOS:

Integridade total na abordagem

Honestidade nas recomendações

Visão responsável das oportunidades

Foco em ações de alta receita para o cliente

Não exploração ou criação artificial de necessidades

 

DURAÇÃO: ~2:40 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional estratégico sobre conversão de modelos de negócio
